parameters: \p2Where are we going? Let's join the meeting!
\p2Where are we going? Let's join the meeting!
\chiefThat tooth is MASSIVE... it undoubtedly came from
the Giant Goblin. You... you actually did it!
\chiefI know we discussed information... ask me anything!
I have knowledge on a wide range of subjects.
\chiefWhat a name! There isn't talk of such
terrifying things in our town. Although...
\chiefI remember when I was a young 'un, much younger than yourselves,
my dear mother would recall horrifying tales of a \c[18]Lord of Shadows\c[0].
\c[18]He\c[0] would decapitate and eat the heads of misbehaving children.
\chiefBy the time I had my first drink, I'd stopped
believing in \c[18]him\c[0]. Oh, I used to get up to
no good! Although, many childhood tales
are rooted in some sort of truth.
\p3Okay... yeah, that could be \c[18]him\c[0]. Not exactly the
information we need, but thank you regardless.
\chiefI apologize if my information did not suffice.
Try heading to the Blazing Sands and seeing
if anyone there knows a thing or two!
\chiefThen please, get to it! I implore you!
\p3Glad you remember that. Say... if \N[1] were
interested in becoming a Tellurian knight,
would you put in a good word for him?
\chiefWithout a doubt! He led the team that saved
Solus Valley's economy! I'll even bring gifts
\p3Sounds good, thank you. We'll let you know the time and place!
\p2That's all three leaders! Let's head back to
Baron Smirnoff and get this ceremony started!
\chiefI apologize if my information did not suffice.
Try heading to the Blazing Sands and seeing
if anyone there knows a thing or two!
\chiefSo it IS you four! When I heard these soldiers
were assisted by a group of brave adventurers,
your team was my first thought.
\chiefWe need a plan moving forward. What happened to
Greenfield is horrific, but there's nothing we
can do about it. We need to make sure the same
thing doesn't happen to Solus Valley!
\knightRight... but is there really anything we CAN do?
like we blinked, then the town was suddenly
\knightClearly \c[18]his\c[0] army is extremely mobile. We'll need
\p3But how are we going to track \c[18]him\c[0] down if all our manpower
is on defense? The attacks aren't going to stop until
\c[18]he\c[0]'s razed every last city to the ground.
\chiefI hear what you're saying. The fact of the matter is that we
don't stand a chance against \c[18]him\c[0] if more cities fall. Losing
Solus Valley would relinquish control of the Easin Plains
to \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0]. Who knows what \c[18]he\c[0]'ll be able to do then?
is OUR job. After all, that's what we've been doing
\p4Do you have any leads that could help us
kind of at a dead end right now.
\chiefWell, actually... I DO know someone that might
have pertinent information. I'm not sure how
willing they are to give it up, though.
\chiefHow about this? You three from Greenfield need to work on
moving the survivors. You four, come outside with me.
We're going to pay a visit to the town jail.
\knightOn behalf of the town of Greenfield... well, whatever's left of it...
thank you for your help. We are most certainly in your debt.
\solI know we need to start moving the survivors, but
those monsters did a number on me. I just need to
\solWe'll help the survivors soon. I just need some of
that peace and quiet Solus Valley is known for.
\chiefGlad you could make it. Let's talk business.
\chiefSo I guess I'll start by asking...
who are you, and what do you do?
\chiefI see. That actually makes things easier,
since I can easily pay you. Think you're
up to kill something 4 times your size?
\p3What kind of abomination is that big?
\chiefIt's the Giant Goblin, ringleader of a group of goblins
that recently sprung up in a nearby cave. They've been
terrorising coastal fishermen, which has started to
have a significant effect on our economy.
\chiefSlay this foul beast, and you shall
be rewarded! What were you thinking?
\chiefSay no more. The Giant Goblin has been terrorising us
long enough. I'll give you any information you need
\chiefCross the bridge east of town, it'll take you
right to the Goblin Grotto. Can't miss it.
Come back here once that thing is dead!
\p2Uh... I think we actually took it out already,
without even knowing it was bothering you!
\chiefThat tooth is MASSIVE... it undoubtedly came from
the Giant Goblin. You... you actually did it!
\chiefI know we discussed information... ask me anything!
I have knowledge on a wide range of subjects.
\chiefWhat a name! There isn't talk of such
terrifying things in our town. Although...
\chiefI remember when I was a young 'un, much younger than yourselves,
my dear mother would recall horrifying tales of a \c[18]Lord of Shadows\c[0].
\c[18]He\c[0] would decapitate and eat the heads of misbehaving children.
\chiefBy the time I had my first drink, I'd stopped
believing in \c[18]him\c[0]. Oh, I used to get up to
no good! Although, many childhood tales
are rooted in some sort of truth.
\p3Okay... yeah, that could be \c[18]him\c[0]. Not exactly the
information we need, but thank you regardless.
\chiefI apologize if you were looking for more.
Try heading to the Blazing Sands and seeing
if anyone there knows a thing or two!
